title: MLflow Custom View Catalog
description: Custom A2UI catalog for the model trace explorer custom view. Extends the basic catalog's Text, Row, and Column components with MLflow-specific StatCard, DataTable, TimelineChart, TreeView, Carousel, FeedbackForm, ContentViewer, and AssessmentBoard components.

StatCard.description: A metric card displaying a value, a caption, and a tinted icon. Matches the tool-call statistics cards on the experiment overview page.

value.description: The metric value to display, e.g. "14" or "275.71ms".

icon.description: The icon to display next to the value.

tone.description: The color tone applied to the icon.

DataTable.description: A generic, domain-agnostic table. Callers describe the columns and supply rows whose cells are positionally aligned to the columns. An optional per-row color renders a leading indicator dot in the first cell.

title.description: Optional heading shown above the table.

icon.description: Optional icon shown next to the title.

color.description: Optional CSS color for a leading indicator dot.

cells.description: Cell values, positionally aligned to the columns.

emptyMessage.description: Text shown when there are no rows.

TimelineChart.description: A generic Gantt-style timeline. Each row is a horizontal bar positioned by its start/end offsets (in milliseconds, relative to a common origin). The component computes the axis, scaling, and duration labels, and works for any number of rows. Mirrors the Details & Timeline gantt view.

title.description: Optional heading shown above the chart.

icon.description: Optional icon shown next to the title.

rows.description: The timeline rows, in display order.

label.description: The row label (e.g. the span name).

color.description: Optional CSS color for the bar.

emptyMessage.description: Text shown when there are no rows.

TreeView.description: A collapsible, indented tree of nodes (mirroring the Details & Timeline span tree). Supports a structured filter over node attributes and a live execution-time-window slider. Works for any number of nodes and nesting depth.

title.description: Optional heading shown above the tree.

nodes.description: The root nodes of the tree, in display order.

filter.description: Optional structured filter applied to node attributes.

emptyMessage.description: Text shown when no nodes match.

Carousel.description: Renders one child component at a time with previous/next controls and a position indicator. Domain-agnostic: supply a list of child component ids to step through.

children.description: The child component ids to step through, in order.

emptyMessage.description: Text shown when there are no children.

FeedbackForm.description: Wraps the trace explorer's real AssessmentCreateForm so feedback submitted here is persisted to the backend as a span-scoped assessment. Each instance targets one span.

traceId.description: The id of the trace the span belongs to.

spanId.description: The id of the span the feedback is scoped to.

spanName.description: The display name of the span, shown in the header.

inputs.description: The span's input fields, revealed behind the 'Show span input / output' toggle.

label.description: The field key shown above its value.

value.description: JSON-encoded field value (object -> JSON, string -> text).

outputs.description: The span's output fields, revealed behind the 'Show span input / output' toggle.

label.description: The field key shown above its value.

value.description: JSON-encoded field value (object -> JSON, string -> text).

ContentViewer.description: A single titled, optionally-collapsible content block that renders key/value fields with the same JSON/Text/Markdown/Table snippet renderer as the trace explorer's Details & Timeline view. Scoped to one payload (e.g. inputs OR outputs), so render it once per payload.

title.description: Heading for the block, e.g. "Inputs" or "Outputs".

icon.description: Optional icon shown next to the title.

label.description: The field key shown above its value.

value.description: JSON-encoded field value (object -> JSON, string -> text).

collapsible.description: Whether the block is wrapped in a collapsible section.

emptyMessage.description: Text shown when there are no fields.

AssessmentCard.description: A single assessment box: the category is the header, the verdict is a colored badge, and the rationale fills the body. Sentiment drives the color (green positive, red negative/error). Reusable — append one per assessment into an AssessmentBoard (or any Row/Column).

name.description: The assessment category, shown as the box header.

value.description: The verdict/value, shown as a colored badge.

rationale.description: The explanation shown in the box body.

AssessmentBoard.description: A wrapping container for assessment boxes. Renders an optional title followed by a wrapping row of child component ids (typically one AssessmentCard per assessment). Add more assessments by appending more AssessmentCard children.

title.description: Optional heading shown above the boxes.

icon.description: Optional icon shown next to the title.

children.description: The card component ids to lay out in a wrapping row.

emptyMessage.description: Text shown when there are no cards.

TreeNode.description: A single tree node. Children are nested recursively.

id.description: Opaque node id reported to the host on selection (e.g. the span id).

label.description: The node label (e.g. the span name).

icon.description: The span icon type (matches the Details & Timeline icons).

hasException.description: Renders the icon in the danger tone with an exception marker.

isRootSpan.description: Renders the icon in the root/AI tone.

badge.description: Optional trailing tag text (e.g. an assessment count).

attributes.description: Opaque metadata used only for filtering (e.g. type, hasException, logLevel, durationMs, startOffsetMs, endOffsetMs).

TreeFilter.description: Structured predicate over node attributes. Mirrors the trace explorer's span-filter concepts so it can be produced by UI controls or hand-written JSON.

types.description: Keep nodes whose attributes.type is in this list.

nameContains.description: Keep nodes whose label contains this substring (case-insensitive).

hasException.description: Keep only nodes whose attributes.hasException is true.

minLogLevel.description: Keep nodes whose attributes.logLevel is at least this value.

minDurationMs.description: Keep nodes whose attributes.durationMs is at least this value.
